texto: I believe the greatest pleasure in writing is in the progressive artistry of it. Each project is an attempt to do better than before - to produce a worthy work of art - something having meaning not only for the writer but also for those who may share the experience of it later. I treasure the hope of producing something that will make a difference in the world - some kind of positive change.
explicacao: Citação de Linda Jo Martin sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I believe the greatest pleasure in writing is in the progressive artistry of it. Each project is …” articula reflexao, art, transformation em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e trabalho.
